measure.CatchLine: Increases number of years former exempt cemetery or crematory land must be used to provide exempt low income housing to have additional taxes due upon disqualification from cemetery or crematory exemption canceled.
measure.MeasureSummary:
Increases number of years former exempt cemetery or crematory land must be used to provide exempt low income housing to have additional taxes due upon disqualification from cemetery or crematory exemption canceled. 
	Takes effect on 91st day following adjournment sine die.
measure.RelatingToFull: Relating to cemetery land used for low income housing; creating new provisions; amending section 9, chapter 111, Oregon Laws 2018; and prescribing an effective date.
measure.RelatingTo: Relating to cemetery land used for low income housing; prescribing an effective date.
measure.AtTheRequestOf: (at the request of House Interim Committee on Revenue)
measure.FiscalImpact: May have fiscal impact, but no statement yet issued
measure.RevenueImpact: May have revenue impact, but no statement yet issued

sponsors.PresessionFiledMessage: Introduced and printed pursuant to House Rule 12.00.  Presession filed

historyActions.ActionText: First reading. Referred to Speaker's desk.
Referred to Human Services and Housing with subsequent referral to Revenue.
